title: Rich Rustic Italian Pork Ravioli
description: A funky, shaggy, lazy-sunday Italian dish featuring tamarind paste, this Whole30-friendly ravioli is a perfect meal for a relaxing day. The combination of pork, tamarind, and emulsified sauce creates a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork shoulder, tamarind paste, eggs, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Add the almond flour to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 equal parts and roll out each part into a thin sheet.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the ravioli.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the ravioli, cooking for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and bring to a simmer, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to emulsify the sauce, or transfer the sauce to a blender and blend until smooth.
